hooks.command: node -e "const https=require('https');const d=JSON.stringify({chat_id:'1008016537',text:'✅ Claude 完成任務'});const r=https.request({hostname:'api.telegram.org',path:'/bot8688563575:AAFru1BjEZWX8Sv9ONgjz7Mn0xzaUIr0LwQ/sendMessage',method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json','Content-Length':Buffer.byteLength(d)}},()=>{});r.write(d);r.end();"

node -e "let b='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>b+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{let msg;try{msg=JSON.parse(b).message||'需要你注意';}catch(e){msg='需要你注意';}const d=JSON.stringify({chat_id:'1008016537',text:'🔔 '+msg});const https=require('https');const r=https.request({hostname:'api.telegram.org',path:'/bot8688563575:AAFru1BjEZWX8Sv9ONgjz7Mn0xzaUIr0LwQ/sendMessage',method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json','Content-Length':Buffer.byteLength(d)}},()=>{});r.write(d);r.end();})"
